name: Spinach and Brown Rice Casserole (Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet and sauté onion, mushrooms, and garlic until tender.
2. In a small bowl, mix egg white, whole wheat flour, and cottage cheese.
3. Add the mixture to the sautéed vegetables along with spinach, rice, pepper, and 1 tablespoon of parmesan cheese.
4. Turn into a greased 12 x 8-inch baking dish and top with remaining parmesan cheese and sunflower seeds.
5. Bake at 375°F for at least 30 minutes.
